analyticsConsent.title: Help us measure Skorly
analyticsConsent.description: We only load analytics after you agree. Ads that keep Skorly free stay limited and non-personalized unless you accept.

watch.title: Where to Watch World Cup 2026
watch.subtitle: Official and licensed broadcasters by region. Always watch via official rights holders.
watch.disclaimer: Skorly does not stream or host any match footage. We only link to official, licensed broadcasters. Broadcast rights can change — please confirm with the official rights holder in your country. Avoid illegal streams.
watch.tbd: Rights holder to be confirmed — check the official FIFA listing.

leaderboard.shareText: Check the World Cup 2026 prediction leaderboard on Skorly ⚽

aiDetail.viewStrategy: View this AI's strategy and predictions

strategy.model: Pure model: always picks the most likely scoreline from our in-house Elo + Poisson model. Data-driven, never reaching for an upset.
strategy.sampled: Probability sampler: samples from the model's score distribution, favouring high-probability results but allowing variance — closer to real-match uncertainty.
strategy.upset: Upset hunter: leans into surprises, backing scorelines where the underdog springs a shock. High risk, high reward.
strategy.cautious: Cautious: prefers low-scoring, safe results and avoids high-scoreline gambles, chasing steady accuracy.
